query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.customerName,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sba.billingItemExternalId) AS matched_billing_items,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT bi.description ORDER BY bi.description SEPARATOR ' | ') AS matched_descriptions,
  SUM(bi.lineAmount) AS total_matched_revenue
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.supplierName LIKE '%Channel%' OR s.supplierName LIKE '%ECN%'
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerName
ORDER BY s.monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.customerName,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sba.billingItemExternalId) AS matched_billing_items,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT bi.description ORDER BY bi.description SEPARATOR ' | ') AS matched_descriptions,
  SUM(bi.lineAmount) AS total_matched_revenue
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.supplierName LIKE '%Channel%' OR s.supplierName LIKE '%ECN%'
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerName
ORDER BY s.monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 20;
